Connect your life

The more you connect, the less you need to log manually. Start with at least 2.

Screen Time

Via weekly screenshot

+

Screen Time

Take a screenshot of your weekly Screen Time report and upload it here. We'll extract the data automatically.

📸

Upload Screen Time screenshot

Settings → Screen Time → See All App & Website Activity → tap "Week"

Why a screenshot?
Apple doesn't share Screen Time data with apps. We use on-device OCR to read your screenshot — nothing leaves your phone.

This week's nudge

You spent 9h scrolling between 9–11pm. Try charging your phone in another room after 9pm.

Now

Your nudges

One suggestion per week. Track what worked.

This week — 18 June

Charge your phone in another room after 9pm to cut the 9h scrolling habit.

In progress
Last week — 11 June

Block 3 gym sessions in your calendar as non-negotiable — treat them like meetings.

Worked — 1 to 3 sessions
2 weeks ago — 4 June

Set a hard stop at 6pm on Tuesdays and Thursdays. Use that time for your partner.

Skipped
3 weeks ago — 28 May

Replace your morning news scroll with 20 min reading. Your "Learning" category is at 0.

Worked — 0 to 3h learning
4 weeks ago — 21 May

You had 14 meetings over 30 min this week. Decline or shorten 3 of them next week.

Worked — saved 2.5h
